channel.title: right|right RSS Feed
channel.description: i am giuseppe sorrentino and this is my personal digital playground

item.title: windows subsystem for linux: never prompt your ssh passphrase again
item.description: how to configure a passphrase-less ssh setup for wsl — windows subsystem for linux —basing on keychain, credentials manager, task scheduler and a bunch of scripts

item.title: three things I learnt being a scrum master
item.description: three thoughts I noted down in 4 years of scrum mastering

item.title: screeps.com: a functional boilerplate
item.description: an easy to configure and to expand boilerplate for screeps.com

item.title: expedia code academy: introdution to computation using python
item.description: a 8 lessons introductory course to computation based on python and organized for the expedia code academy

item.title: neaps: no-estimates agile process simulator
item.description: a simulator to forecast the end of agile project basing on historical data and using montecarlo simulations

item.title: User eXperience fast and smart - Come integrare la UX in lean startup
item.description: a 20 minutes deck on the integration of lean startup with ux methods (in Italian)

item.title: users’ context of use through clustering algorithms
item.description: a small experiment on how k-means clustering can be used to extrapolate users' context of use

item.title: one thing I learnt about lean UX
item.description: a small reflection on lean ux objectives

item.title: divide et impera
item.description: a four bullets strategy to split user stories vertically

item.title: be agile…stay lean
item.description: a gentle introduction to agile/lean principles

item.title: evergreen
item.description: evergreen was a government-sponsored, social networking website primarily aimed at encouraging elderly people to take part in community-based gardening projects

item.title: lottomatica vip program
item.description: the VIP Program is a big lottomatica effort to reward usual customers any time they play on the site.

item.title: dirty soccer: league of dodgers
item.description: dirty soccer was a football manager game where you could win also cheating

item.title: tatami: the CSS boilerplate for fly-kicking websites
item.description: a lightweight, beautiful, responsive-ready and style-agnostic CSS boilerplate.
